purpose: Freeze the operational, executable normalization of raw primary (QUADPROG_SQRT) solver behavior into the closed eligibility enum (owner review correction 4). Makes 'no substring matching' executable and separates the historical false-infeasibility proof from future-row eligibility.
matching_discipline: Exact exception class AND exact complete message string, OR a certifier-completed predicate outcome. NO substring/regex/partial matching. An unknown class OR an unknown message maps to INTEGRITY_DEFECT, never to fallback eligibility, never by analogy.

registered_mappings.disposition: invoke PIQP_P2 exactly once (decision-table B -> D)
registered_mappings.future_row_semantics: On a newly encountered instance, this normalized status is FALLBACK-ELIGIBLE but is NOT evidence that the original model is feasible. Feasibility or qualification remains to be established by the fallback and the common certifier. The historical proof that the five characterized F_Q instances were numerical false-infeasibilities applies to those five rows only and is established by multiple independent solver implementations fully qualifying each row under the complete registered predicate; the exact per-row qualifying sets are bound in the candidate-universe artifact. It does not transfer to unseen rows.

raw.outcome: finite, correctly dimensioned, correctly mapped candidate; external certifier completes normally; the complete registered predicate (KKT AND two-sided signed-gap) is FALSE

registered_mappings.disposition: invoke PIQP_P2 exactly once (decision-table B -> D)
registered_mappings.future_row_semantics: Eligible for the single fallback attempt; not evidence of feasibility.

invalid_run_triggers_not_eligible_for_fa: unexpected exception class OR unregistered status message
invalid_run_disposition: INTEGRITY_DEFECT -> STOP; fallback is never invoked

fallback_dispositions.FALLBACK_QUALIFIED: PIQP_P2 qualifies under the common certifier -> accept the fallback point
fallback_dispositions.UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE: PIQP_P2 completes but does not qualify -> STOP

prohibited: eligibility by analogy for unknown statuses
